bird.name: Sumatran frogmouth
bird.summary: The Sumatran frogmouth (Batrachostomus poliolophus), also known as the short-tailed frogmouth and the pale-faced frogmouth, is a nocturnal…

relations.subject: Sumatran frogmouth
relations.evidence: The main threat to this species is habitat loss caused by the deforestation of lowland forests on Sumatra
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Sumatran frogmouth
relations.evidence: The main threat to this species is habitat loss caused by the deforestation of lowland forests on Sumatra
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
